meanings.usage: 作“发现”义时，常接oil/gold等矿产类名词；作“击打”义时为不及物或及物动词
指钻井作业中钻出的孔洞，也可表示钻井过程中产生的碎屑
表示圆形物体的直径，常用搭配：in diameter（直径为……）
石油行业中特指开采石油的井架，也可指港口的重型起重机
block and tackle为固定搭配，指滑轮组；也可作动词表示“处理、解决”
作“旋转”义时可指物体绕轴转动；作“轮流”义时可指人员轮班
指研究地球物质结构、历史的专业人员，词根geology为地质学
可指几何形状的圆柱体，也可指发动机的气缸
地质学中特指地层，也可引申指社会阶层
可指液体、气体的循环，也可指信息、货币的流通
正式用词，搭配endeavour to do sth. 表示努力做某事
除指爱情相关的浪漫外，还可表示想法脱离实际、理想化
石油行业特指会自动喷出石油的油井，词根gush为动词“喷涌”
mineral deposit为固定搭配，指矿床；也可指银行存款或租房押金
指需要付出很大力气拖拽重物，常用于工业、运输场景

phrases.usage: 字面义为钻探到石油，也可引申为突然发财、交好运

examples.en: After three years of exploration, the team finally struck oil in the desert.
examples.zh: 经过三年勘探，团队终于在沙漠中钻探到了石油。

examples.en: He struck oil when his small invention was bought by a big company.
examples.zh: 他的小发明被大公司收购后，他一下子就发了财。

phrases.usage: 固定搭配，指地壳中聚集的矿产资源

examples.en: Geologists have found a rich mineral deposit in the mountain area.
examples.zh: 地质学家在山区发现了一处储量丰富的矿床。

examples.en: The country's economy relies heavily on the exploitation of its mineral deposits.
examples.zh: 该国经济严重依赖其矿产资源的开采。

phrases.usage: 此处指搭建、建造；还可表示张贴、提供住宿

examples.en: They plan to put up a temporary office on the construction site.
examples.zh: 他们计划在工地上搭建一间临时办公室。

examples.en: We can put you up for the night if you miss the last train.
examples.zh: 如果你赶不上末班车，我们可以给你提供一晚住宿。

phrases.usage: 固定术语，指滑轮组，用于吊运重物

examples.en: Workers used a block and tackle to lift the heavy machine onto the truck.
examples.zh: 工人们用滑轮组把沉重的机器吊到了卡车上。

examples.en: The oil derrick is equipped with a block and tackle to handle long drill pipes.
examples.zh: 钻井架配备了滑轮组来搬运长钻杆。

phrases.usage: 表示“装有、配备有”，主语通常为物品

examples.en: All new cars in this country are fitted with safety belts as standard.
examples.zh: 这个国家所有的新车都标配了安全带。

examples.en: The laboratory is fitted with the latest testing equipment.
examples.zh: 这个实验室配备了最新的检测设备。

phrases.usage: 表示“偶尔、有时”，相当于occasionally，作时间状语

examples.en: Every so often, I go hiking in the hills to relax.
examples.zh: 我偶尔会去山里徒步放松一下。

examples.en: You should check the tire pressure every so often to avoid accidents.
examples.zh: 你应该偶尔检查一下胎压，避免发生事故。

phrases.usage: 正式表达，意为“通过、借助于”，后接名词或动名词

examples.en: The rescue team located the trapped miners by means of a special detector.
examples.zh: 救援队借助一种特殊探测器找到了被困矿工的位置。

examples.en: We can express our feelings by means of body language when we don't speak the same language.
examples.zh: 当我们语言不通时，可以借助肢体语言来表达感受。

phrases.usage: 此处指“引导流出、引出”，还可表示“开始、开头”

examples.en: Pipes are installed to lead off the excess water from the reservoir.
examples.zh: 安装了管道来引出水库里多余的水。

examples.en: The singer will lead off the festival with a popular song.
examples.zh: 这位歌手将演唱一首流行歌曲，拉开音乐节的序幕。

grammar.title: 被动语态的应用
grammar.definition: 用于强调动作的承受者，或动作的执行者不需要、不便指出的场景，在科普类说明文中使用广泛
grammar.structure: be + 动词过去分词（+ by + 动作执行者）
grammar.usage: 常用于客观说明事物的原理、操作流程，避免主观表述，增强内容的客观性和专业性

examples.en: When it has been decided where we are going to drill, we put up at the surface an oil derrick.
examples.zh: 当确定了钻探地点后，我们就在地面上搭起钻井架。

examples.en: This pressure must be under control, and we control it by means of the mud which we circulate down the drill pipe.
examples.zh: 这种压力必须得到控制，我们通过沿钻杆向下循环的泥浆来控制它。

examples.en: All the samples will be analyzed in the laboratory next week.
examples.zh: 所有样本下周都会在实验室进行分析。

grammar.title: 定语从句的分隔结构
grammar.definition: 定语从句和所修饰的先行词之间被其他成分分隔，避免句子头重脚轻，常见于较长的复合句中
grammar.structure: 先行词 + 状语/其他修饰成分 + 关系代词/关系副词 + 定语从句
grammar.usage: 当先行词后的定语从句较长，或先行词后需要补充其他必要信息时，会使用分隔结构，识别时需先找准先行词

examples.en: It cuts a clean cylinder of rock, from which can be seen the strata the drill has been cutting through.
examples.zh: 它切下一个光滑的岩石圆柱体，从中可以看到钻头钻过的岩层。

examples.en: We endeavour to avoid the old, romantic idea of a gusher, which wastes oil and gas.
examples.zh: 我们努力避免那种旧式的、理想化的井喷现象，这种现象会浪费石油和天然气。

examples.en: A new teacher will come tomorrow who will teach you geography.
examples.zh: 明天会来一位新老师，教你们地理。

grammar.title: 原因状语从句
grammar.definition: 用于说明主句动作发生的原因，常由because, as, since等连词引导
grammar.structure: 主句 + because/as/since + 原因状语从句
grammar.usage: because语气最强，用于回答why的提问，说明直接原因；as和since语气较弱，通常表示已知的、显而易见的原因

examples.en: It has to be tall because it is like a giant block and tackle and we have to lower into the ground and haul out of the ground great lengths of drill pipe.
examples.zh: 它必须很高，因为它就像一个巨大的滑轮组，我们得把很长的钻杆放到地下，再从地下拉出来。

examples.en: Once we get down to the oil, it usually flows to the surface because great pressure either from gas or water, is pushing it.
examples.zh: 一旦我们钻到石油，石油通常会涌向地表，因为来自天然气或水的巨大压力在推着它。

examples.en: As the weather is getting colder, we need to prepare more warm clothes for the elderly.
examples.zh: 由于天气越来越冷，我们需要给老人准备更多保暖衣物。

sentencePatterns.pattern: ... has done more to ... than any other ...

original.en: The search for oil has done more to improve deep drilling than any other mining activity.
original.zh: 钻探石油对改进深钻技术的贡献，比其他任何采矿活动都大。

imitations.en: The development of mobile Internet has done more to change people's way of communication than any other technology in the past 20 years.
imitations.zh: 移动互联网的发展对改变人们沟通方式的贡献，比过去20年其他任何技术都大。

imitations.en: Regular exercise has done more to improve his physical condition than any other health care method.
imitations.zh: 规律锻炼对改善他身体状况的作用，比其他任何保健方法都大。

original.en: Once we get down to the oil, it usually flows to the surface because great pressure either from gas or water, is pushing it.
original.zh: 一旦我们钻到石油，石油通常会涌向地表，因为来自天然气或水的巨大压力在推着它。

imitations.en: Once you have mastered the basic rules of the language, you will be able to communicate with local people smoothly.
imitations.zh: 一旦你掌握了这门语言的基本规则，就能顺畅地和当地人交流了。

imitations.en: Once the project is approved, we will start the construction work as soon as possible.
imitations.zh: 一旦项目获得批准，我们就会尽快开工建设。

original.en: It has to be tall because it is like a giant block and tackle and we have to lower into the ground and haul out of the ground great lengths of drill pipe.
original.zh: 它必须很高，因为它就像一个巨大的滑轮组，我们得把很长的钻杆放到地下，再从地下拉出来。

imitations.en: The new library has to be designed with large open spaces because it needs to hold thousands of books and accommodate hundreds of readers at the same time.
imitations.zh: 新图书馆必须设计有大面积的开放空间，因为它需要存放数千册图书，同时容纳数百名读者。

imitations.en: The hospital's emergency passage has to be kept clear all the time because ambulances need to pass through at any time.
imitations.zh: 医院的应急通道必须时刻保持畅通，因为救护车随时都需要通行。
